extortion.description: Excavations Tourigny specializes in excavation, civil engineering, snow removal, and transportation services. The company caters to clients in the construction and infrastructure sectors. They are based in Victoriaville, QC and operate during regular business hours. Excavations Tourigny is dedicated to delivering quality work through their team of skilled professionals. Employees: 60 Revenue: $6.7 Million Industry: Construction Management Phone Number: (819) 330-3000
